# Automation Paths
> Revenue Systems Architecture & AI Automation for agencies, coaches,
> and growth-stage businesses.

Automation Paths is run by Riazul Islam, a Revenue Systems Architect
and Fractional CTO with 7+ years experience and $59.76M in attributed
client revenue.

## Services
- CRM Architecture (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce)
- Voice AI Agents (VAPI, Twilio)
- SMS and Chat AI (OpenAI, Claude, GoHighLevel)
- Automation Pipelines (n8n, Make)
- Full-Stack Applications (Next.js, Supabase)
- Lead Routing Systems
- Email Deliverability Systems

## Hire
- Upwork: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/automationpaths
